changelog: Fixed a race where a Reset to Default cycle's own finish_firstboot.sh could get killed by an unrelated, concurrently-triggered maintenance-mode pass of first_boot.sh -- both run inside the SSH addon's container, and the maintenance pass unconditionally stops that addon as its last step. Reproduced with zero external interference (SSH left completely untouched during the cycle). The maintenance branch now defers entirely if .reset_cycle_active is set, instead of racing an in-progress cycle.
